editorial_accuracy.notes: 31 chapters with evidence tiers, cross-links, reading time. No content changes this run.

information_design.notes: Canonical link tags now managed per-page. JSON-LD + OG + Twitter + canonical on all pages. Donation CTAs on methodology and sources pages.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Social sharing dropdown (X, LinkedIn, Email, Copy Link, native share). Toast replaces alert(). Search input uses semantic variables.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. No hardcoded colors remain. Removed redundant dark mode CSS override.

accessibility.notes: Share toast has aria-live=polite. No regressions.

security.notes: No regressions. All external links use noopener noreferrer.
